summary: PR #2256 decompiled two functions in src/melee/mn/mnname.c: fn_80238540 and mnName_80239FFC. It also updated mnname and mnnamenew headers with HSD_GObj-based prototypes and added a MnName_GObj struct used by mnName_80239FFC. PR body and bot report claim both functions reached 100% match; review feedback called out replacing raw gobj pointer math with actual jobj/struct access.

key_files.role: Implements fn_80238540 as a state switch over mn_804A04F0.x10 and implements mnName_80239FFC cleanup logic using MnName_GObj, HSD_JObj child access, HSD_JObjRemoveAll, and HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4.
Adds baselib includes, defines MnName_GObj with HSD_GObj prefix and HSD_Text* text field, and replaces UNK_PARAMS for touched or called input functions with HSD_GObj* prototypes.
Adds baselib forward include and changes mnNameNew_MainInput prototype to take HSD_GObj* so fn_80238540 can call it with typed arguments.

what_changed.text: Replaced the placeholder for fn_80238540 with a switch on (s32) mn_804A04F0.x10 dispatching to mnName_MainInput, mnNameNew_MainInput, or mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput for cases 0, 1, and 2.

Replaced the placeholder for mnName_80239FFC with cleanup code that obtains a jobj through MnName_GObj/HSD_GObj storage, removes all children from the selected child jobj, frees text with HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4 when non-null, and clears mn->text.
Added MnName_GObj in mnname.h with HSD_GObj gobj, x38, and HSD_Text* text fields.
Updated prototypes for mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput, mnName_MainInput, fn_80238540, mnName_80239FFC, and mnNameNew_MainInput to use HSD_GObj* where the diff shows typed call surfaces.
Added needed includes for mnmain.h, mnnamenew.h, baselib/gobj.h, baselib/jobj.h, and baselib/sislib.h on the touched source/header surfaces.

smart_moves.text: The final diff avoids the reviewed raw byte-pointer access pattern and expresses the object layout through MnName_GObj and HSD_JObj fields.
The dispatch wrapper fn_80238540 is kept as a straightforward switch rather than a generated branch ladder, matching the simple state-dispatch role shown by the diff.
Header prototypes were updated alongside the recovered bodies/calls instead of leaving UNK_PARAMS on the touched interfaces.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering GObj/JObj code, prefer an actual struct or known field path over byte pointer arithmetic once the layout is known or can be represented locally.
If a recovered function proves that neighboring input handlers take HSD_GObj*, update the relevant header prototypes and includes together with the body.
A small mode-dispatch function can often be represented as a normal switch over a menu state field when the cases directly call mode-specific handlers.

naming_conventions.text: The PR keeps the address-style name fn_80238540 for a matched function whose semantic name is not established in the evidence.
The newly introduced struct name MnName_GObj follows the subsystem/object pattern visible in the diff and embeds HSD_GObj at offset 0.
Local variables such as gobj, jobj, child, and mn use short role names where the object roles are explicit in the recovered code.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used a switch with explicit cases 0, 1, and 2 for fn_80238540 dispatch.
Introduced a temporary local struct type to express known offsets in the GObj-backed object instead of keeping raw offset loads.
Matched-function evidence is from the PR body and decomp-dev bot report: ninja builds clean, fuzzy_match_percent 100.0 for all functions, and 2 new matches totaling +188 bytes.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: This should use the actual `jobj` struct, not pointer math.

follow_up_queries: review comment actual jobj struct not pointer math

notes: Changed files, PR metadata, PR body, review comment, full raw diff, and bot report are available in the loaded slice.
The raw_pr_json loaded file is truncated, but the needed PR identity, body, changed files, review comment, and diff evidence are present elsewhere untruncated.
Verification claims are recorded as PR/body and bot-report evidence only; no independent build or objdiff was run during intake.

The review comment hunk shows an earlier raw pointer-math version, while the final loaded diff shows MnName_GObj/HSD_JObj field access; intake does not infer reviewer approval beyond the recorded comment.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed GObj/JObj struct access instead of raw pointer math
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2256 provides a concrete review-backed example in mnName_80239FFC: raw `(u8*) gobj` plus offset access was called out by review, and the final diff represents the access through MnName_GObj and HSD_JObj fields.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered body signatures should update headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2256 updates HSD_GObj* prototypes in mnname.h and mnnamenew.h while adding matched bodies/calls in mnname.c, making the call surface consistent with the recovered code.

rejection_notes: Do not promote MnName_GObj layout as a global path fact solely from this PR; it is a local struct introduced by the diff and would need current-source/layout corroboration before source-corpus promotion.
Do not treat the PR's Claude Code note as evidence of original source style or reviewer intent.
Do not independently claim the functions are currently matched beyond the PR body and bot report evidence loaded for this historical slice.
